name: The Bunker
address: 305 17th Ave SW Suite D, Minot, ND 58701
about: The Bunker is an indoor junior golf training facility and simulator venue operated by the Minot Junior Golf Association. It features three Full Swing simulator bays and a 1,000 sq. ft. putting green with PuttView technology. The facility focuses on providing year-round golf programming for youth, with a typical operating season from October through April. It offers clinics, camps, and lessons, and provides an affordable, accessible environment for golfers of all ages, especially minors and their accompanying adults.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing simulator technology for a realistic experience
Focus on junior development and year-round training
Free access for qualified youth and accompanying adults

food_and_drink.notes: A small selection of snacks for sale; outside food is welcome.
No alcohol is mentioned on the website.

simulator_hardware.notes: Features three Full Swing simulator bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs as they are not provided by the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, outside food is welcome, but you must clean up after yourself. Food and drinks are not allowed on the simulator or putting green.

faq.question: How long is a typical 18-hole simulation?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole simulation is not specified on the website. Pricing is based on an hourly rate.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Bunker is specifically designed to be kid-friendly, offering youth programming, clinics, and affordable pricing for golfers 18 and under.
